title: The Campaign of Said b. al-'A^ in Tabaristan
description: It was related to me by'Umar b. Shabbah-'Ali b. Muhammad (alMada'ini)-'Ali b. Mujahid-Hanash b. Malik: In the year 30 (650-5i), Said b. al-'As set out on campaign from Kufah, aiming at Khurasan, accompanied by Hudhayfah b. al-Yaman and a group of the Companions of the Messenger of God. With him were alHasan, al-Husayn, 'Abdallah b.'Abbas, 'Abdallah b. 'Umar, 'Abdallah b. 'Amr b. al-'A$, and 'Abdallah b. al-Zubayr. [At the same time] 'Abdallah b. 'Amir set out from Bagrah for Khurasan.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 15
